_comment: MCP-server / skill listing for OpenClaw ClawHub, Awesome OpenClaw Skills, AI Agent Store, and the official MCP registry. The server is the existing `gametheory-mcp` stdio server (also streamable-HTTP). Confirm each registry's exact submission schema before publishing; this is the source-of-truth content.
name: snhp-negotiation
description: Get the math-optimal next move in a price negotiation, in plain dollars. Tell gt_negotiate_turn your side, walk-away $, target $, and the other side's offers; it returns the dollar counter to send, a ready-to-send message, and when to accept or walk. Negotiates ~12% better head-to-head (validated; n=20 paired LLM negotiations, p<0.0001). For multi-issue deals (a job offer, a vendor contract) use gt_negotiate_bundle, which logrolls across linked issues. Works against any counterparty with zero setup, no LLM required. Also includes auctions, optimal reserves, stable matching, dynamic pricing, and an advanced verified agent-to-agent peering + AP2 settlement flow.
